name: Patient Portal
description: Patient dashboard, health records, data marketplace, and consultation booking

screens.name: Patient Dashboard
screens.description: Main patient view with health stats, upcoming consultations, and access log

sections.title: Upcoming Consultations
sections.description: 3 mock consultations with doctor name, specialty, date, status badge. Each row links to /consultation/{id}

sections.title: Recent Access
sections.description: 3 mock access log entries showing accessor, action, timestamp, wallet address, CRE Verified badge

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: App logo/brand name in nav header — Shield icon + text, links to /
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Nav header link — currently active page, styled as text-foreground font-medium
elementDescriptions.Sign In: Thirdweb ConnectButton label — opens wallet connect modal with email/social options for patients
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD balance in nav header — KosynUSD.balanceOf(address) / 1e18, displayed with CircleDollarSign icon
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token label in nav header — part of KusdBadge component, muted foreground text
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Deposit button in nav header — dashed emerald border, Plus icon, opens DepositModal
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Network badge in nav header — blue dot + chain name from useActiveWalletChain(), mapped via CHAIN_META
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Wallet address button in nav header — Thirdweb detailsButton, opens wallet details panel
elementDescriptions.82: Health Score stat value — from HealthRecordRegistry.getHealthScore(address), red-400 Heart icon
elementDescriptions.Health Score: Stat label — first cell in divide-x stats bar, paired with Heart icon
elementDescriptions.4: Records stat value — from HealthRecordRegistry.getRecordCount(address), blue-400 Activity icon
elementDescriptions.Records (stat): Stat label — second cell in divide-x stats bar, paired with Activity icon
elementDescriptions.2: Active Consents stat value — from PatientConsent.getActiveConsents(address), emerald-400 ShieldCheck icon
elementDescriptions.Active Consents: Stat label — third cell in divide-x stats bar, paired with ShieldCheck icon
elementDescriptions.$12.50: Marketplace Earnings value — from DataMarketplace.getEarnings(address), emerald-400 CircleDollarSign icon
elementDescriptions.KUSD (badge): Badge next to $12.50 — outline badge with emerald styling, indicates KosynUSD denomination
elementDescriptions.Earnings: Stat label — fourth cell in divide-x stats bar, below $12.50 KUSD value
elementDescriptions.Book Consultation: CTA button — CalendarPlus icon + text, right-aligned in action row, links to /patients/book
elementDescriptions.Consultations: Section heading — text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground, above consultations table
elementDescriptions.Doctor: Table column header in ConsultationList — doctor name column
elementDescriptions.Specialty: Table column header in ConsultationList — specialty column
elementDescriptions.Date: Table column header in ConsultationList — formatted as 'MMM d, yyyy' via date-fns
elementDescriptions.Time: Table column header in ConsultationList — formatted as 'h:mm a' via date-fns
elementDescriptions.Status: Table column header in ConsultationList — right-aligned, shows status badge
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen: Consultation row — Internal Medicine, Feb 27 2026 10:00 AM, status: upcoming. Links to /patients/consultation/1
elementDescriptions.Dr. James Wilson: Consultation row — Cardiology, Feb 22 2026 2:30 PM, status: completed. Links to /patients/consultation/2
elementDescriptions.Dr. Aisha Patel: Consultation row — Dermatology, Feb 18 2026 9:00 AM, status: completed. Links to /patients/consultation/3
elementDescriptions.Internal Medicine: Specialty cell for Dr. Sarah Chen — muted foreground text
elementDescriptions.Cardiology: Specialty cell for Dr. James Wilson — muted foreground text
elementDescriptions.Dermatology: Specialty cell for Dr. Aisha Patel — muted foreground text
elementDescriptions.Feb 27, 2026: Date cell for Dr. Sarah Chen consultation — formatted via format(date, 'MMM d, yyyy')
elementDescriptions.Feb 22, 2026: Date cell for Dr. James Wilson consultation — formatted via format(date, 'MMM d, yyyy')
elementDescriptions.Feb 18, 2026: Date cell for Dr. Aisha Patel consultation — formatted via format(date, 'MMM d, yyyy')
elementDescriptions.10:00 AM: Time cell for Dr. Sarah Chen consultation — formatted via format(date, 'h:mm a')
elementDescriptions.2:30 PM: Time cell for Dr. James Wilson consultation — formatted via format(date, 'h:mm a')
elementDescriptions.9:00 AM: Time cell for Dr. Aisha Patel consultation — formatted via format(date, 'h:mm a')
elementDescriptions.upcoming: Status badge — blue styling (bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400), consultation is in the future
elementDescriptions.completed: Status badge — green styling (bg-green-500/10 text-green-400), consultation has ended
elementDescriptions.Access History: Section heading — text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground, above access log table
elementDescriptions.Accessor: Table column header in AccessLog — accessor name column
elementDescriptions.Action: Table column header in AccessLog — action description column
elementDescriptions.Time (access): Table column header in AccessLog — formatted as 'MMM d, h:mm a' via date-fns
elementDescriptions.Address: Table column header in AccessLog — truncated wallet address in monospace
elementDescriptions.Verified: Table column header in AccessLog — right-aligned, shows CRE badge
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen (access): Access log row — 'Viewed health records', Feb 28 10:00 AM, 0x9abc...def0, CRE verified
elementDescriptions.Dr. James Wilson (access): Access log row — 'Generated consultation report', Feb 27 2:30 PM, 0x5678...9abc, CRE verified
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Access log row — 'Record encrypted and stored', Feb 26 9:15 AM, 0xdef0...1234, CRE verified
elementDescriptions.Viewed health records: Action cell — from HealthRecordRegistry.AccessGranted event action field. Demo: mockLogs array
elementDescriptions.Generated consultation report: Action cell — from HealthRecordRegistry.AccessGranted event action field. Demo: mockLogs array
elementDescriptions.Record encrypted and stored: Action cell — CRE workflow completion event. Demo: mockLogs array
elementDescriptions.0x9abc...def0: Accessor wallet address — monospace code element, from AccessGranted event accessor field
elementDescriptions.0x5678...9abc: Accessor wallet address — monospace code element, from AccessGranted event accessor field
elementDescriptions.0xdef0...1234: Accessor wallet address — monospace code element, from CRE workflow event
elementDescriptions.CRE: Verified badge — emerald outline badge with ShieldCheck icon, confirms action ran inside CRE TEE enclave

steps.description: User clicks 'Book Consultation' button
Next.js Link navigates to /patients/book
User clicks consultation row in ConsultationList
Next.js Link navigates to /patients/consultation/{id}

screens.name: My Records
screens.description: Encrypted health record browser with upload, passkey decryption, filter, and data marketplace opt-in

sections.description: Record cards showing type icon/badge, upload date, 'Encrypted (AES-256-GCM)' label, PasskeyDecrypt button. Data from useMockRecords() hook.

sections.title: Data Marketplace
sections.description: Opt-in switch, data category badges (Vitals, Medications, Lab Results, Diagnoses), earnings display in KUSD

states.description: Wallet connected — records visible with filter bar, upload button, and marketplace

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: App logo/brand name in nav header — Shield icon + text, links to /
elementDescriptions.Records: Nav header link — currently active page, styled as text-foreground font-medium
elementDescriptions.Sign In: Thirdweb ConnectButton label — opens wallet connect modal with email/social options
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD balance in nav header — KosynUSD.balanceOf(address) / 1e18, CircleDollarSign icon
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token label in nav header — part of KusdBadge component, muted foreground text
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Deposit button in nav header — dashed emerald border, Plus icon, opens DepositModal
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Network badge in nav header — blue dot + chain name from useActiveWalletChain()
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Wallet address button in nav header — Thirdweb detailsButton
elementDescriptions.All records are encrypted with AES-256-G: Subtitle — centered text-sm text-muted-foreground, explains encryption guarantee
elementDescriptions.Create Record: Button below subtitle — Plus icon, navigates to /patients/records/new
elementDescriptions.All: Filter tab — default active, shows all record types. Button variant toggles default/outline
elementDescriptions.Health: Filter tab — filters records to health type. Label from typeConfig
elementDescriptions.Consultation: Filter tab — filters records to consultation type
elementDescriptions.Certificate: Filter tab — filters records to certificate type
elementDescriptions.Prescription: Filter tab — filters records to prescription type
elementDescriptions.Upload Record: Upload button right of filter bar — Upload icon, triggers triggerWorkflow('record-upload')
elementDescriptions.Record #1: Record card — type icon in muted bg, Record #1 title, type badge, upload date, Lock icon + 'Encrypted (AES-256-GCM)', PasskeyDecrypt button
elementDescriptions.Record #2: Record card — same layout as Record #1 with different type/date
elementDescriptions.Record #3: Record card — same layout as Record #1 with different type/date
elementDescriptions.Record #4: Record card — same layout as Record #1 with different type/date
elementDescriptions.Encrypted (AES-256-GCM): Encryption label on each record card — Lock icon + text, text-xs text-muted-foreground
elementDescriptions.Decrypt: PasskeyDecrypt button on each record card — Fingerprint icon, triggers WebAuthn verification
elementDescriptions.Data Marketplace: Card title — Database icon + text, with Switch toggle on the right for opt-in/out
elementDescriptions.Sell anonymized health data for KUSD. Al: Marketplace description — text-xs text-muted-foreground under card title
elementDescriptions.Data categories to share: Label above category badges — visible when marketplace is opted in
elementDescriptions.Vitals & Metrics: Data category badge — toggleable, selects vitals data for marketplace sharing
elementDescriptions.Medications: Data category badge — toggleable, selects medication data for marketplace sharing
elementDescriptions.Lab Results: Data category badge — toggleable, selects lab result data for marketplace sharing
elementDescriptions.Diagnoses: Data category badge — toggleable, selects diagnosis data for marketplace sharing
elementDescriptions.Earnings: Label in earnings box — visible when marketplace is opted in
elementDescriptions.12.50: KUSD earnings amount — DollarSign icon, text-2xl font-bold, from DataMarketplace.getEarnings(address)
elementDescriptions.KUSD (earnings): Token label next to earnings amount — text-sm text-muted-foreground
elementDescriptions.From 3 anonymized queries this month: Earnings subtitle — text-xs text-muted-foreground, query count from DataMarketplace

states.name: Uploading Record
states.description: Upload flow triggered — CRE TEE encrypting and storing record on IPFS

op.value: Uploading...

Upload button in loading state — spinner + text, CRE TEE is encrypting record and uploading to IPFS

states.name: Record Decrypted
states.description: A record has been decrypted via WebAuthn passkey — shows decrypted content

op.value: Decrypted

elementDescriptions.Decrypted: PasskeyDecrypt button in verified state — LockOpen icon, emerald-400 text, disabled button
elementDescriptions.Decrypted — Viewing plaintext: Status label replacing 'Encrypted (AES-256-GCM)' — record content now visible

steps.description: User clicks 'Upload Record' button
triggerWorkflow('record-upload', { patientData }) via POST /api/cre/record-upload
CRE TEE encrypts data, uploads to IPFS, writes hash on-chain
Success toast, new record card appears in grid
User clicks PasskeyDecrypt button on record card
WebAuthn navigator.credentials.get() prompts fingerprint/face
Button changes to 'Decrypted' (green lock-open icon)
User toggles marketplace Switch to on
Category badges appear, user selects data types
Earnings display shows KUSD amount (mock: 12.50)

screens.name: Create Health Record
screens.description: Template picker for creating new health records — select type, fill form, encrypt and upload via CRE TEE

sections.description: ArrowLeft back button + title 'Create Health Record' + subtitle about TEE encryption
5 template cards: Vitals (Heart icon), Medical History (FileText icon), Medications (Pill icon), Lab Results (Activity icon), Upload PDF (Upload icon). Click to select and show corresponding form.
Dynamic form based on selected template. Each form has specific fields and an 'Encrypt & Upload via CRE' submit button.
CRE Workflow sidebar — shows step-by-step progress of the record-upload workflow with status icons (pending/processing/done/error)

states.name: Template Picker

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: App logo/brand name in nav header — Shield icon + text, links to /

elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token label in nav header — part of KusdBadge component
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Deposit button in nav header — opens DepositModal
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Network badge in nav header — chain name from useActiveWalletChain()
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Wallet address button in nav header — opens wallet details
elementDescriptions.Create Health Record: Page title — text-2xl font-bold, next to ArrowLeft back button
elementDescriptions.Choose a template or upload a PDF. All d: Subtitle — text-sm text-muted-foreground, explains TEE encryption
elementDescriptions.Vitals: Template card label — Heart icon, description: 'Blood pressure, heart rate, weight, temperature'
elementDescriptions.Blood pressure, heart rate, weight, temp: Template card description — text-xs text-muted-foreground under Vitals label
elementDescriptions.Medical History: Template card label — FileText icon, description: 'Conditions, surgeries, family history'
elementDescriptions.Conditions, surgeries, family history: Template card description — text-xs text-muted-foreground under Medical History label
elementDescriptions.Medications: Template card label — Pill icon, description: 'Current prescriptions, dosages, schedules'
elementDescriptions.Current prescriptions, dosages, schedule: Template card description — text-xs text-muted-foreground under Medications label
elementDescriptions.Lab Results: Template card label — Activity icon, description: 'Blood work, imaging, diagnostic tests'

elementDescriptions.Upload an existing medical document: Template card description — text-xs text-muted-foreground under Upload PDF label

elementDescriptions.Encrypt with AES-256-GCM: CRE workflow step — pending status (Clock icon), first step in record-upload pipeline
elementDescriptions.Upload to IPFS via Pinata: CRE workflow step — pending status, second step in pipeline
elementDescriptions.Register hash on-chain: CRE workflow step — pending status, third step in pipeline

states.name: Form Active
states.description: Template selected — form visible with fields, CRE feed sidebar idle

elementDescriptions.Change template: Ghost button in form card header — resets to template picker view
elementDescriptions.Encrypt & Upload via CRE: Submit button at bottom of form — triggers triggerWorkflow('record-upload') with form data
elementDescriptions.Notes: Textarea label — present in all form templates, placeholder varies by template

states.name: CRE Processing
states.description: Form submitted — CRE workflow steps progressing in sidebar, toast notification shown

elementDescriptions.Encrypting record inside CRE TEE enclave: Toast notification — info level, shown via toast.info() on form submit
elementDescriptions.Record encrypted and stored on IPFS. Has: Success toast — shown after 4s timeout via toast.success()

steps.description: User selects a template card (Vitals, Medical History, etc.)
Form appears with template-specific fields, user fills in data
User clicks 'Encrypt & Upload via CRE'
triggerWorkflow('record-upload', { type, ...formData }) — CRE TEE encrypts
CreFeed sidebar shows step-by-step progress (encrypt → IPFS → on-chain)
Success toast after 4s: 'Record encrypted and stored on IPFS. Hash registered on-chain.'

screens.name: Book Consultation
screens.description: 3-step wizard: select doctor, pick time, pay (KUSD or Stripe)

steps.label: Select Doctor
steps.description: 2-column grid of 4 mock doctor cards (avatar, name, specialty badge, fee in KUSD). Click to select.

steps.label: Select Time
steps.description: shadcn Calendar (past dates disabled) + 2-column grid of 10 time slot buttons

steps.label: Payment
steps.description: KUSD/Card toggle. KUSD: mock balance check + 1.5s delay. Card: POST /api/stripe/checkout → redirect.

dialogs.title: Booking Confirmed
dialogs.description: Shows doctor name and instructions about access approval. 'Done' button closes.

steps.description: User selects doctor card in DoctorPicker
User picks date and time slot in CalendarPicker
User selects KUSD payment method, clicks Pay
1.5s mock delay, onPaymentComplete('kusd') fires
Confirmation dialog opens with booking details
User selects doctor, picks time, selects Card payment
POST /api/stripe/checkout with { amount, doctorName }
Stripe creates checkout session, returns URL
window.location.href redirects to Stripe checkout
Stripe redirects back to /patients/book?payment=success
